Returns
30-day returns & legal warranties
Return a product up to 30 days
Request the return of a product up to 14 days from receipt, for any reason, to get a full refund (price and shipping fees) under your legal right of withdrawal. Additionally, amazon.fr allows return right up to the 30th day with price refunded excluding shipping fees. Some products are excluded from return rights (e.g. perishable food). To learn more about returns (including exceptions, return costs), visit this page for products shipped by Amazon and this page for products shipped by third party sellers.

Get a repair, a replacement or a refund, free of charge for 2 years after your purchase under the legal warranty of conformity (e.g. malfunction, breakdown). The legal warranty against hidden defects also applies. Learn more about these warranties.
Read full Amazon return policy
Insurance plans
Available
Cover against accidental damage or theft
After adding the product to the basket, you can select an insurance plan to protect your product against accidental damage, theft or to extend the manufacturer warranty.
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more
Delivery
OTP or signature verification
Delivery with one-time password or signature verification
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. On the day of delivery, you will receive a six-digit code to give to the delivery driver in person. Please do not share the code over the phone or intercom. We can't refund packages that are lost or stolen after you provide the one-time password to the driver for delivery. Learn more

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      3.0 out of 5 stars Informations contradictoires
      Reviewed in France on 23 March 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Dans le titre de l'article il est écrit qu'il fait 128GB mais dans le descriptif il était précisé 256GB. L'article fait 128GB, j'avoue que ce n'était pas très clair.

    • AXN INFORMATQIUE
      1.0 out of 5 stars Pas en version Entreprise !
      Reviewed in France on 27 March 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Après une première commande non reçu (égaré bien sur), nous avons eu ces téléphones. Attention, ce ne sont pas des Éditions Entreprise garantie 3 ans !!!

    • QUARANTA Marc Condorcet
      3.0 out of 5 stars Code pin a taper 30 fois par jour
      Reviewed in France on 25 September 2025
      Verified Purchase
      Le telephone est bien. le logiciel est trop compliqué et ça buggue. il me demande mon code trop souvent. En lieu verifié il reclame parfois le code PIN. Si on est exterieur il faut taper le code a chaque fois. l'empreinte ne fonctionne pas car j'ai protegé la vitre. 2 amis ont cassé la vitre en moins de 15 jours.
      Sur Xiaomi l'empreinte est letérale donc pas de problemes pour la reconnaissance.
      La commande vocale c'est pas terrible malgré la voix enregistré sur 3 textes differents.
      Pourquoi faire compliqué quand on peut faire simple et fiable ?
      Le code est un gros probleme qui fait perdre du temps. je veux connecter waze il faut le code. pas pratique du tout.
      je ne rachetrais pas cette marque a cause du logiciel
      Read more
      4 people found this helpful
